text: Subah subah bank se EMI bounce ka notification aaya aur mera dil baith gaya, par main rone ka risk nahi le sakta kyunki bacchon ki college fees aur ghar ka kirana mujh par tike hain. Barson pehle sarkari naukri na milne ka dukh daba kar is umar mein bhi machine ki tarah kaam kar raha hoon kyunki main parivaar ka ekmatra sahara hoon. Thakan itni hai ki sharir saath nahi deta, par mere rukne ka matlab hai pura khandaan sadak par aa jayega.

Business mein layoff ka mahol hai aur aaj EMI bounce ho gayi hai, par main apne darr ko dimaag mein jagah nahi de sakta kyunki mujhe ghar ka 'head' hone ka farz nibhana hai. Papa ne kisan hokar mujh par jo investment ki thi, uska karz utaarne ke liye main apni health neglect karke din-raat bhatak raha hoon. Mujhe har haal mein ye bojh uthana hi hoga kyunki failure ka koi margin mere paas bacha hi nahi hai.

Bank notification dekh kar pata chala ki home loan ki kist nahi gayi, aur ab darr hai ki bank wale ghar aakar parivaar ki 'izzat' mitti mein na mila dein. Main apni suppressed ambitions ko bhool kar bas ek structural endurance mein jee raha hoon taaki budhe maa-baap ki dawai aur ghar ka kharcha chalta rahe. Mere paas thakne ya bimaar hone ka waqt nahi hai kyunki poora khandaan meri taraf umeed se dekh raha hai.

MNC ki naukri mein politics aur stress itna hai ki dimaag fatne ko hota hai, par EMI bounce hone ke baad ab mujhe extra freelance kaam bhi lena pad raha hai. First-gen earner hone ka yahi bojh hai ki aapko girne ki permission nahi milti, bas ek kartavya samajh kar pathar ki tarah khade rehna padta hai. Mere kandhon par jo zimmedari hai, woh meri personal takleef se kahi zyada badi hai aur main rukna afford nahi kar sakta.

EMI bounce hone se ghar ka mahol kharab hoga, isliye main ab health neglect karke overtime kar raha hoon taaki kisi ko pata na chale. Gaon mein kisan bhai aur maike mein sabko lagta hai ki shehar mein main bohot sukoon mein hoon, aur main unka bharosa nahi tod sakta. Ye structural endurance hi meri reality hai, jahan emotion se zyada 'family honour' mahatvapurna hai aur main bas ek machine hoon.
